title: Context Gateway – Compress agent context before it hits the LLM
summary: Open-source proxy compressing tool outputs before entering LLM context using SLMs. Addresses context degradation (GPT-5.4: 97.2% at 32k → 36.6% at 1M tokens). Includes spending caps and session dashboard.

title: Spine Swarm – AI agents on infinite visual canvas
summary: YC S23 multi-agent system for non-coding projects (competitive analysis, financial modeling, SEO audits). Visual canvas with blocks instead of chat. 87.6% on DeepMind DeepSearchQA benchmark.

title: pycoClaw – OpenClaw-class agents on ESP32
summary: Autonomous agents on MicroPython hardware. 26k LOC PFC Agent uses LLM to self-program local scripts. Includes ScriptoStudio IDE (PWA), ScriptoHub repository, custom C extensions for ESP32.

title: Axe – 12MB binary AI agent framework
summary: Go-based agent framework treating LLM agents like Unix programs. Stdin piping, sub-agent delegation, persistent memory, MCP support, multi-provider. Path-sandboxed file operations.

title: agent-browser-protocol – Open-source browser for AI agents
summary: Chromium fork keeping agents synchronized with browser. Freezes JS execution after actions, captures state + events. 90.5% on Online Mind2Web benchmark with Opus 4.6.

title: Mog Programming Language – Statically typed embedded language for LLMs
summary: Compiled embedded language for AI agents. Full spec in 3,200 tokens. Capability-based permissions, compiles to native code. Allows agents to self-modify without restart.

title: superpowers – Agentic skills framework
summary: Agentic skills framework and software development methodology. 92,484 stars, gained 3,078 today. Shell-based framework for building agent capabilities.

title: GitNexus – Zero-server code intelligence engine
summary: Client-side knowledge graph creator in browser. Drop GitHub repo/ZIP, get interactive graph with Graph RAG Agent. 16,753 stars, 1,116 gained today.

title: deepagents – LangChain agent harness
summary: Agent harness with LangChain/LangGraph. Planning tool, filesystem backend, spawn subagents. 14,172 stars, 1,415 gained today.

title: claude-hud – Claude Code plugin
summary: Claude Code plugin showing context usage, active tools, running agents, todo progress. 5,652 stars, 466 gained today.

title: Mistral Forge – Build-your-own AI for enterprise
summary: Mistral lets enterprises train custom AI models from scratch on own data, challenging rivals using fine-tuning and retrieval approaches.

title: NemoClaw – Nvidia enterprise AI agent platform
summary: Nvidia announced open enterprise AI agent platform built off viral OpenClaw, addressing security concerns for enterprise deployment.

title: Pentagon developing alternatives to Anthropic
summary: After falling-out, Pentagon exploring alternatives to Anthropic for military AI. Considering OpenAI, xAI Grok, other providers.

title: Google Personal Intelligence expanding to all US users
summary: Personal Intelligence allows Google AI assistant to tap into Google ecosystem (Gmail, Photos) for tailored responses.

title: DOJ: Anthropic can't be trusted with warfighting systems
summary: Government responds to Anthropic lawsuit, saying company lawfully penalized for trying to limit military use of Claude AI models.

title: China's OpenClaw boom drives AI gold rush
summary: Open source agent hype driving people to rent cloud servers and buy AI subscriptions, creating windfall for Chinese tech companies.

title: Sears exposed AI chatbot conversations
summary: Customer conversations with Sears AI chatbots including contact info exposed to web, enabling phishing attacks and fraud.

title: Nemotron 3 Nano 4B – Compact hybrid model
summary: Nvidia 4B parameter hybrid model for efficient local AI deployment on edge devices.

title: Holotron-12B – High throughput computer use agent
summary: 12B parameter model specialized for computer use tasks with high throughput for GUI automation.

title: State of Open Source on Hugging Face: Spring 2026
summary: Comprehensive overview of open source AI ecosystem trends on Hugging Face platform in early 2026.

title: GPT-5.4 mini and nano – OpenAI efficient models
summary: GPT-5.4 mini ($0.75/$4.50 per 1M) and nano ($0.20/$1.25 per 1M). Nano cheaper than Gemini Flash-Lite. Mini 2x faster than previous.

title: Mistral Small 4 – 119B MoE model
summary: Apache 2 licensed 119B MoE (6B active) unifying Magistral reasoning, Pixtral multimodal, Devstral agentic coding. Supports reasoning effort levels.

title: Codex subagents now GA
summary: OpenAI Codex subagents reach GA. Default subagents for explorer/worker/default. Custom agents as TOML files with custom instructions.
